en-US.description:
Practice is a beautifully simple habit tracker designed to help you build consistency with daily check-ins and streaks.

Create habits in seconds, organize them with categories, and edit them anytime as your routines evolve.

KEY FEATURES
- Simple daily check-ins
- Streaks (current and highest) and progress details per habit
- Full-year streak history in a GitHub-style grid
- Habit categories with searchable picker
- Edit habit name and category anytime
- Search habits on the home screen
- Helpful loading and empty states
- iCloud Sync
- Native iOS design
- Privacy-first

HOW IT WORKS
1. Add a habit you want to build
2. Choose a category that matches your goal
3. Check it off each day you complete it
4. Open the habit to review streaks, progress, and your full-year history
5. Update or refine habits as your routine changes

Practice is perfect for:
- Daily exercise
- Reading
- Meditation
- Learning a language
- Any habit you want to make stick

The key to lasting habits is consistency. Practice gives you just enough tracking to stay accountable without becoming a chore.
en-US.promoText: Build better routines with categorized habits, quick daily check-ins, and a full-year streak history. Create, edit, and search habits in a native iOS app synced through iCloud.
en-US.releaseNotes:
New in this version:
- Full-year streak history on each habit in a GitHub-style grid
- Scrolls horizontally so you can look back across the year
- Month labels help you find past stretches at a glance

Thanks for using Practice!
en-US.title: Practice: Habit Tracker
en-US.subtitle: Build Streaks Daily

review.notes:
This is a habit tracking app that allows users to:
1. Create habits with a category
2. Edit habit name and category later
3. Check in daily to mark habits as complete
4. View streaks and progress inside each habit’s detail screen
5. Search habits from the home screen

TESTING THE APP
1. On the home screen, tap the + button to create a new habit
2. Enter a name (e.g., “Exercise”)
3. Tap Category to open the category picker and select one
4. Tap the checkmark in the header to save
5. Tap the circle next to a habit to mark it complete for today
6. Tap the habit row to open details — you will see:
   - Streaks (Current and Highest)
   - Progress (Total check-ins, Last check-in)
7. Tap “Edit habit” from the detail screen to update name/category
8. Use pull-to-refresh on the home list
9. Use the home search bar to filter habits
10. Long-press a habit for quick actions (mark complete/incomplete, delete)

Empty states:
- When there are no habits, the app shows a “No Habits Yet” message.
- If search has no matches, the app shows a “No Matching Habits” message.

iCloud Sync:
If iCloud is enabled, data is stored in iCloud. If iCloud is unavailable, the app shows a message and stores data locally.

No sign-in required.
